tables.name: users
tables.ddl: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, email TEXT, region TEXT, age INTEGER, created_at TEXT)

tables.name: orders
tables.ddl: CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, product TEXT, amount REAL, status TEXT, ordered_at TEXT)

tables.name: products
tables.ddl: CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, category TEXT, price REAL, stock INTEGER)

tables.name: reviews
tables.ddl: CREATE TABLE reviews (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER, rating INTEGER, comment TEXT)

tasks.buggy_sql: SELEC id, name FROM users WHERE region = 'north' ORDER BY id;
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE region = 'north' ORDER BY id;

tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHER region = 'south';
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE region = 'south';

tasks.description: Fix missing string quotes: region = north → region = 'north'
tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT name, age FROM users WHERE region = north;
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT name, age FROM users WHERE region = 'north';

tasks.description: Fix typo: ORDR BY → ORDER BY
tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT product, amount FROM orders ORDR BY amount DESC LIMIT 3;
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT product, amount FROM orders ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 3;

tasks.description: Fix wrong JOIN key: o.id → o.user_id
tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT u.name, SUM(o.amount) AS total_spent FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY total_spent DESC;
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT u.name, SUM(o.amount) AS total_spent FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY total_spent DESC;

tasks.description: Fix missing GROUP BY after COUNT aggregate
tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'completed';
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY order_count DESC;

tasks.description: Fix wrong status filter: cancelled → completed
tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT u.name, o.product, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'cancelled' ORDER BY o.amount DESC;
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT u.name, o.product, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' ORDER BY o.amount DESC;

tasks.description: Fix WHERE COUNT() → HAVING COUNT() for aggregate filter
tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.name WHERE COUNT(o.id) > 1;
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.name HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 1;

tasks.description: Fix wrong JOIN key in 3-table join
tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS completed_orders, SUM(o.amount) AS total_spent FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY total_spent DESC, u.name ASC;
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS completed_orders, SUM(o.amount) AS total_spent FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY total_spent DESC, u.name ASC;

tasks.description: Fix 3 bugs: wrong JOIN, wrong aggregate, missing GROUP BY column
tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT u.name, p.category, SUM(p.price) AS revenue FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.id JOIN products p ON o.product = p.name WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.name, p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC;
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT u.name, p.category, SUM(o.amount) AS revenue FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id JOIN products p ON o.product = p.name WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.name, p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC;

tasks.description: Fix JOIN using wrong FK: r.user_id → r.product_id
tasks.buggy_sql: SELECT p.name, p.category, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON p.id = r.user_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.category ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;
tasks.correct_sql: SELECT p.name, p.category, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.category ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;
